'''Grigor''' was the [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the planet [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Biography==
A corrupt governor who set up his own illegal mining operation of [[Dragite crystal|dragite]] on the planet, Grigor replaced the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] under his command with pirates loyal to him. He oppressed the indigenous [[H'drachi]], and eliminated at least one Rebel cell with a stormtrooper assault.

Grigor was working in league with Ambassador [[Jollie]] to cover up these events, and became of aware of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Lynch Hauser]]'s suspicions about his activities. Seeking to legitimize his rule in the eyes of the local population, he captured 'Queen' [[Mora]], a descendant of the former M'haeli Human royal family, and broadcast his intentions to marry her. Grigor died at the [[Battle of Red Rock]] after he was arrested by Imperial officer [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]], who had been sent by Grand Moff Lynch to investigate the situation. His life ruined, he attempted to escape by holding Mora at gunpoint. A swift kick by Ranulf, however, redirected the blaster towards his own head, where it subsequently went off, killing him instantly.

{{Char-stub}}
